messages.subject: [OGRUG] R-UG-Ottawa @ The R Conference
messages.body_plain:
Dear R-UG-Ottawa,

We would like to invite you to R|Gov, The R Conference | Government &
Public Sector <http://rstats.ai/gov> taking place on December 3-4, with
workshops on the 2nd. The talks and panel will focus on the work done in
government, defense, NGOs, and the public sector. A great group of data
scientists will be gathering from organizations like NASA, the The
Department of National Defence, The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, US
Army, Institute for Defense Analyses, US Census Bureau, Virginia Tech,
Inter-American Development Bank, Harvard Business School. Speakers and
panelists include Andrew Gelman, Lucy D?Agostino McGowan, Tyler Morgan
Wall, Kimberly F. Sellers, and 27 others.

To see what the virtual R Conferences are like, you can check out the
recent NY Conference recap
<https://www.landeranalytics.com/post/sixth-annual-new-york-r-conference-brings-together-r-community-even-remotely>.
Please use our code OTTAWAR20 for a 20% discount on conference & workshop
tickets <https://rstats.ai/tickets/>. This conference will include 24
talks, a panel, whiskey and gin master classes with R?my Cointreau,
community and networking breaks, happy hours, prizes and giveaways, a
Twitter Contest, Meet the Speaker series, Job Board access, and
participation in the Art Auction.


The December 2nd workshops are as follows:

-Using Mapping for Public Service with Kazuki Sakamoto

-Causal Inference in R with Lucy D?Agostino McGowan and Malcolm Barrett
(half-day)

-Introduction to Machine Learning for Public Policy with Jonathan Hersh

Learn more and register at rstats.gov !


Hope you can join us!
Amada

*Amada Echeverria*
*Events and Marketing Coordinator*
Lander Analytics | New York, NY
m: (201) 472-3934 | LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/in/amada-echeverria/>
www.landeranalytics.com

* <http://www.landeranalytics.com>*

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
